Class GitHubTree

com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.broadcasters.Multicaster
com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.repeaters.BaseRepeater
com.telenav.kivakit.component.BaseComponent
com.telenav.kivakit.filesystems.github.GitHubTree

Component, com.telenav.kivakit.core.function.ResultTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.core.language.trait.LanguageTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.core.language.trait.SilentTryTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.core.language.trait.TryTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Broadcaster, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Listener, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Repeater, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Transceiver, com.telenav.kivakit.core.project.ProjectTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.core.registry.RegistryTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.core.vm.JavaTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.code.TripwireTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.messaging.Receiver, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.messaging.Transmitter, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.naming.NamedObject, com.telenav.kivakit.resource.packages.PackageTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.settings.SettingsTrait
public class GitHubTree extends BaseComponent
Holds information for an entire GitHub repository tree, given a username, repository and branch.
Author:
jonathanl (shibo)

  • Method Details

    • tree

      public static GitHubTree tree(com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Listener listener, String username, String accessToken, String repository, String branch)
      The current tree for the given username, repository and branch
      Parameters:
      username - The GitHub username
      repository - The name of the repository on GitHub
      branch - The branch of the repository
      Returns:
      A complete GitHub tree for the given username, repository and branch.
